name: Goddess Skuld's Oracle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スクルドの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>託</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: If all monsters you control are "Valkyrie" monsters (min. 1), you can add 1 "Goddess Verdande's Guidance" from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can look at the top 3 cards of your opponent's Deck, and if you do, place them on top of their Deck in any order, but you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fairy monsters. You can only activate 1 "Goddess Skuld's Oracle" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: If all monsters you control are "Valkyrie" monsters (min. 1), you can add 1 "Goddess Verdande's Guidance" from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can look at the top 3 cards of your opponent's Deck, and if you do, place them on top of their Deck in any order, but you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fairy monsters. You can only activate 1 "Goddess Skuld's Oracle" per turn.

action: Looks at cards from the top of the opponent's Deck
summoning: Restricts the player's Normal Summons to Type specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
